title: orchis sambucina var. bracteata
intro: Orchis sambucina var. bracteata, also known as the green orchid or green orchid orchid, is a type of orchid native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its greenish-yellow flowers and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Orchis sambucina var. bracteata include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb in the treatment of various ailments. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
